---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose an enhancement to the Synapse pipeline or observability stack
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or gap this feature addresses. Provide context on how it affects the M-Pesa to eTIMS compliance workflow.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature in technical terms. If applicable, reference the pipeline stage it would augment (e.g., schema transformer, storage engine, retry loop).

## East African Context
Does this feature have specific implications for the Kenyan or broader East African market (e.g., new phone number ranges, KRA API changes, regional compliance updates)?

## Acceptance Criteria
Define the conditions under which this feature would be considered complete.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, diagrams, or API documentation links that support this request.
